productDisplayName: Little Miss Women Printed Green T-shirt
description: Composition Green T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a round neck, short sleeves and rubber with flock print on the front Fitting Regular Wash care Mashine wash inside out with similar colours in warm water Do not bleach Dry in shade Do not iron on decorations Feeling bossy? This T-shirt from little miss is exactly what you need to show off your bossy attitude. The rubber and flock print adds a glamourous look, while the cotton fabric keeps you comfortable all day. Pair it with jeans and sneakers. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 5'7", chest 33" and waist 26”
